title: third Eva manga beginning Raising Ikari Shinji
display_title: third Eva manga beginning Raising Ikari Shinji
wikitext:
[]: third Eva manga beginning: Raising Ikari Shinji             Quote Post by Otaprince » Sun Jun 12, 2005 4:16 pm I'm not 100% on all the details, but it seems that the Girlfriend of Steel 2nd manga will either end or continue in another magazine, outside of Shonen Ace. In its place, a new Eva manga will start running: Evangelion: Ikari Shinji Ikusei Keikaku (Raising Ikari Shinji? Just the recent game, anyhow).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 12, 2005 11:55 pm That was... surprisingly mediocre. Doesn't seem interesting in any way at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Mon Jun 13, 2005 2:05 am yeah, it boggles my mind that with all the shitty merchandise and adaptations, they can't let someone *remotely* talented or interested in Eva take a stab at a manga. *I* could do better...!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 13, 2005 2:18 am I could do better if I ever got around to finishing the story.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 13, 2005 7:33 am Something tells me that this is actually better, it's just that this scanlation is really poor. There's a few bits of dialog that are awkward and can only be attributed to bad translation. And then there's the scans.... attrocious!

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Mon Jun 13, 2005 10:42 am modz OWN this thread! so many flashing NERV logos o_o

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Tue Jun 14, 2005 8:01 am spoiled your fun! well actually there is a way to keep it.

[]:             Quote Post by KT Kore » Tue Jun 14, 2005 11:50 am What kind of story do these game-based manga usually have? Just the typical dating sim type thing? I've never really felt interested enough to check them out.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 14, 2005 12:13 pm Well, this one (from it's first stage) shares a lot in common with the alternate universe of 26/Girlfriend of Steel 2 game/manga. Not quite, but close enough. As for the game, I know very little about it. Given that it's one of the many Princess Maker spin-offs, I wouldn't be surprised if it has a lot of dating sim elements, and is essentially just the same thing as Girlfriend of Steel 2, but with more Raising elements.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Jun 17, 2005 2:07 pm As for the game, I know very little about it. Given that it's one of the many Princess Maker spin-offs, I wouldn't be surprised if it has a lot of dating sim elements, and is essentially just the same thing as Girlfriend of Steel 2, but with more Raising elements.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jun 17, 2005 2:16 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Well, this one (from it's first stage) shares a lot in common with the alternate universe of 26/Girlfriend of Steel 2 game/manga. Not quite, but close enough. As for the game, I know very little about it. Given that it's one of the many Princess Maker spin-offs, I wouldn't be surprised if it has a lot of dating sim elements, and is essentially just the same thing as Girlfriend of Steel 2, but with more Raising elements.

[]:             Quote Post by Prons » Fri Jun 17, 2005 2:24 pm I liked the first issue, I always like seeing the Eva characters portrayed as normal folk. I wish they'd stop recycling that Rei-Shinji shower scene, even though this particular manga had the best repesentation of that scene I've seen yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Fri Jun 17, 2005 4:41 pm Been there, read that... Somewhat mediocre, but I'm still intrested to see how it turns out. At least the art is much better than in Love Eva. Any info one the second stage? Or have they abandoned it already?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Jun 17, 2005 5:36 pm At least the art is much better than in Love Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jun 17, 2005 7:29 pm Um is it just me or is Asuka blonde on the cover?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Fri Jun 17, 2005 7:35 pm Well, yes... She is blonde according to Sadamoto and his artwork.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jun 17, 2005 7:45 pm I find that strange but hell I guss the man likes blonds. Edit Also I'm trying to be nice and dl the otrrent for the manga but i;m stuch aat 95% can some one thst DLed the thing turn BT back on for ten minutes?

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sat Jul 02, 2005 8:42 pm Hey I'm new to this forum but.. where can i order/download this it looks sooo funny and cool. and is the character raising thingy in Japanese or english?

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Sun Jul 03, 2005 1:21 am the Raising Shinji game itself is in Japanese...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sun Jul 03, 2005 8:34 am Pffft. I will admit that I hate all of this crap. Girlfriend of Steel and all those other games and stuff. I mean, I know Evangelion is Gainax's prize cash cow, but their ruthless pimpage of the series just annoys me. Then again, maybe it's their way of sticking it to the people that made all that money off of Nadia while they didn't see a thin dime of profit for it.
